testcase.name: Dashboard › displays stat cards with numeric values
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › maestro.spec.ts:21:3 › Dashboard › displays stat cards with numeric values ──────────
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('nav') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: locator('nav') resolved to 3 elements: 1) <nav aria-label="メインナビゲーション" class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-3 py-3">…</nav> aka getByRole('navigation', { name: 'メインナビゲーション' }) 2) <nav aria-label="メインナビゲーション" class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-3 py-3">…</nav> aka getByLabel('メインナビゲーション').nth(1) 3) <nav aria-label="モバイルナビゲーション" class="fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 z-30 border-t border-th-border bg-th-bg/95 backdrop-blur-md px-2 pb-[calc(env(safe-area-inset-bottom)+0.5rem)] pt-2 xl:hidden">…</nav> aka getByLabel('モバイルナビゲーション')
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('nav')
47 | 48 | // Check that key sections are visible > 49 | await expect(page.locator('nav')).toBeVisible(); | ^ 50 | }); 51 | }); 52 | at /Users/naoto/Downloads/maestro/packages/ui/tests/e2e/maestro.spec.ts:49:39

testcase.name: Plugins page › loads and shows skill cards
Plugins page › shows usage count badge on skill cards
Plugins page › AI skill recommender returns results for Japanese query
Plugins page › AI skill recommender clears results when input is cleared
testcase.error:
[chromium] › maestro.spec.ts:169:3 › Plugins page › AI skill recommender clears results when input is cleared
TypeError: searchInput.triple_click is not a function
191 | const clearButton = page.locator('button').filter({ has: page.locator('svg') }).filter({ hasText: '' }).last(); 192 | // Use keyboard shortcut instead as it's more reliable > 193 | await searchInput.triple_click(); | ^ 194 | await searchInput.press('Backspace'); 195 | 196 | // Or click the X button (it's rendered as a button with X icon when query is non-empty) at /Users/naoto/Downloads/maestro/packages/ui/tests/e2e/maestro.spec.ts:193:23
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── test-results/maestro-Plugins-page-AI-sk-b6e82-sults-when-input-is-cleared-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── test-results/maestro-Plugins-page-AI-sk-b6e82-sults-when-input-is-cleared-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: test-results/maestro-Plugins-page-AI-sk-b6e82-sults-when-input-is-cleared-chromium/error-context.md
Retry #1 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TypeError: searchInput.triple_click is not a function
191 | const clearButton = page.locator('button').filter({ has: page.locator('svg') }).filter({ hasText: '' }).last(); 192 | // Use keyboard shortcut instead as it's more reliable > 193 | await searchInput.triple_click(); | ^ 194 | await searchInput.press('Backspace'); 195 | 196 | // Or click the X button (it's rendered as a button with X icon when query is non-empty) at /Users/naoto/Downloads/maestro/packages/ui/tests/e2e/maestro.spec.ts:193:23
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── test-results/maestro-Plugins-page-AI-sk-b6e82-sults-when-input-is-cleared-chromium-retry1/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: Plugins page › category filter tab narrows displayed skills
Navigation › sidebar does not contain a standalone "スキル" nav link
testcase.system-out:
[[ATTACHMENT|../test-results/maestro-Navigation-sidebar-3af6e-n-a-standalone-スキル-nav-link-chromium/test-failed-1.png]]

testcase.name: Navigation › plugins nav link navigates to plugins page with スキル title
testcase.system-out:
